items.title: Geomarketing Market to Reach USD 116.96 Billion by 2032, Driven by Location Data and Emerging Technologies | Research by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The geomarketing market is rapidly expanding, driven by the increasing use of location-specific data and emerging technologies like AI and machine learning. This is enabling more personalized marketing strategies, particularly in industries like retail, real estate, and tourism.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: IBM is mentioned as a key player in the geomarketing market, with its incorporation of AI into cloud applications and consumer research initiatives, which are expected to contribute to the growth of location-based marketing.

Microsoft is also highlighted as a major player in the geomarketing market, with its Azure Maps and Power BI offerings, which are expected to drive the growth of location-based services and analytics.

Cisco is mentioned as a key player in the geomarketing market, with its Cisco Meraki and Cisco Digital Network Architecture solutions, which are expected to contribute to the development of location-based marketing strategies.
Oracle is highlighted as a major player in the geomarketing market, with its incorporation of AI into its cloud applications, which is expected to enhance location-based marketing capabilities.

Adobe is mentioned as a key player in the geomarketing market, with its Adobe Analytics and Adobe Experience Cloud offerings, which are expected to contribute to the development of location-based marketing strategies.

Salesforce is highlighted as a major player in the geomarketing market, with its Salesforce Marketing Cloud and Salesforce Maps solutions, which are expected to drive the growth of location-based marketing.

items.title: Cloud Applications Market to USD 2230.4 Billion by 2032, Owing to Increased Cloud Adoption and Digital Transformation | Research by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The cloud applications market is expected to grow rapidly, reaching $2.23 trillion by 2032, driven by the increasing adoption of cloud-based solutions and digital transformation initiatives across industries. Key factors fueling this growth include the need for remote collaboration tools, cloud-native applications, and multi-cloud environments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Salesforce is a leading provider of cloud-based CRM solutions, which are expected to see strong demand as businesses embrace digital transformation and cloud-based technologies.

Microsoft's cloud platform, Azure, is a major player in the cloud applications market, and the company's suite of cloud-based productivity and enterprise solutions are well-positioned to benefit from the industry's growth.
Oracle has been expanding its cloud-based enterprise offerings, which are expected to contribute to the growth of the cloud applications market.
SAP is a leading provider of cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) solutions, which are a key component of the cloud applications market.
IBM's cloud-based services and solutions are likely to benefit from the growth in the cloud applications market.
Workday is a leading provider of cloud-based human capital management (HCM) and financial management solutions, which are expected to see strong demand as businesses adopt cloud-based applications.

items.title: Gireesh Kambala Receives a 2025 Global Recognition Award for State and Federal Digital Innovation and Leadership
items.author: Gireesh Kambala
items.description: Gireesh Kambala, a technology leader, received a 2025 Global Recognition Award for enhancing federal digital infrastructure and talent development. His innovative solutions improved government efficiency by 35% and 85% of his mentees advanced to senior roles during his two-decade career.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Kambala's leadership roles at IBM have driven measurable improvements by focusing on cultural integration and mentorship, with his team members consistently rating his leadership as exemplary.
